mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_model (model_name, model_code, provider, api_url, api_key, max_tokens, temperature, supports_stream, supports_structured, is_default, is_enabled, description, user_id, sort_order) VALUES (#{modelName}, #{modelCode}, #{provider}, #{apiUrl}, #{apiKey}, #{maxTokens}, #{temperature}, #{supportsStream}, #{supportsStructured}, #{isDefault}, #{isEnabled}, #{description}, #{userId}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_model SET model_name = #{modelName}, model_code = #{modelCode}, provider = #{provider}, api_url = #{apiUrl}, api_key = #{apiKey}, max_tokens = #{maxTokens}, temperature = #{temperature}, supports_stream = #{supportsStream}, supports_structured = #{supportsStructured}, is_default = #{isDefault}, is_enabled = #{isEnabled}, description = #{description}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ai_model WHERE user_id = #{userId} OR user_id IS NULL ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT * FROM ai_model WHERE is_enabled = 1 AND (user_id = #{userId} OR user_id IS NULL) ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT * FROM ai_model WHERE is_default = 1 AND is_enabled = 1 LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM ai_model ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT * FROM ai_model WHERE is_enabled = 1 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_model SET is_default = CASE WHEN id = #{id} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
